title: Explained: 5 things about secretive son Mojtaba Khamenei's rise from shadow power to Iran's new supreme leader after Khamenei’s killing
summary_full: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has emerged from the shadows, inheriting immense power after his father's passing. His quiet but influential rise, marked by deep ties to the IRGC and past controversies, now places him at the helm during a critical period of economic and regional challenges. His leadership promises to shape Iran's future trajectory.
